updates.title: Income tax calendar for May 2026: Check key dates, deadlines for TDS and TCS
updates.summary: From the mandatory deposit of Tax Deducted at Source (TDS) and Tax Collected at Source (TCS) for April 2026 to the issuance of vital certificates and filing of key financial statements, numerous due dates are set throughout the month.

updates.title: DA hike calculator: When is next Dearness allowance hike? How much to expect? How it will impact your salary
updates.summary: On April 18, the Centre raised the dearness allowance for employees by 2%, increasing it to 60%. The next DA hike is expected in July 2026, with a potential increase of 2-3% depending on inflation trends, benefiting approximately 50.46 lakh employees and 68.27 lakh pensioners.

updates.summary: Pump price of petrol is currently at  ₹94.77 per litre in Delhi, while diesel is being retailed at at  ₹87.67 per litre. The domestic LPG cylinder is priced at  ₹913. The government last revised retail prices of petrol and diesel in 2024, cutting them by  ₹2 a litre ahead of the national elections.&nbsp;

updates.title: What happens to a PPF account after the account holder’s death? Nominee rules, withdrawal process explained
updates.summary: After the account holder's death, PPF account closes, and the nominee or legal heir can claim the balance. The account continues to earn interest until the claim is settled, but no new contributions can be made posthumously.
